overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player walks along a futuristic urban street with distinctive orange textured pavement, crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, and continues under a dark overpass with neon signage. The scene features bright afternoon sunlight transitioning to shadow, dense cyberpunk architecture, and moderate pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange textured sidewalk, passing various pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: muscular man in white tank top and track pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard with 'Watson' text and colorful graphics
storefront with teal awning and vintage electronics signage
distinctive orange diamond-patterned pavement covering the pedestrian walkway
tall yellow pole with traffic lights and signage
massive concrete elevated highway structure spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bright orange textured sidewalk in a futuristic commercial district. Neon signs including a prominent Watson billboard line the street while shops with teal awnings occupy the right side. Pedestrians walk in various directions, including a muscular man in a white tank top approaching the camera, as vehicles pass on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: steps off the orange sidewalk onto the yellow striped crosswalk entering the intersection
futuristic vehicles including a black van and red sports car pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, navigating between passing vehicles and other pedestrians while heading toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: black van driving through the intersection from left to right
red sports car crossing the intersection ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive horizontal digital billboard displaying 'MILFGAARD' advertisement with turquoise background
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing marking the asphalt
modern high-rise building with geometric architecture visible beyond the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit intersection dominated by a massive 'MILFGAARD' digital billboard. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk as various futuristic vehicles including a black van and red sports car drive through. The overpass structure looms closer ahead while pedestrians scatter across the intersection and a tall white building rises in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area under overpass with concrete pillars and neon signage

events.description: enters the shadow of the overpass, lighting shifts from bright sunlight to significantly darker mixed lighting
turns left to walk under the overpass structure into the darker covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass shadow and entering the darker covered walkway, approaching the neon-lit corridor

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow hard hat and blue jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: bright red neon sign reading '2ND AMENDMENT' mounted on the building wall
tall gray concrete wall with horizontal lines running along the right side of the walkway
palm trees visible in the distance beyond the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Moving into the shadow of the massive overpass structure, the lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to dimmer mixed lighting. A red neon '2ND AMENDMENT' sign becomes visible on the right concrete wall. The camera turns to follow the sidewalk under the overpass, passing thick concrete pillars as palm trees become visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with neon signage and debris

events.description: fully enters the dark underpass area where artificial neon lighting dominates the scene

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark covered sidewalk under the overpass, passing various pedestrians in the dim corridor

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear walking with a small child along the right wall
man in yellow safety vest and white hard hat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: scattered chairs and trash piled against the concrete wall
digital billboard hanging from the overpass structure displaying advertisements
dark corridor of the overpass extending forward with light visible at the far end

segments.scene_description: Now fully under the overpass, the scene is dominated by dark shadows and artificial neon light from the '2ND AMENDMENT' sign. The walkway is enclosed by concrete walls with debris and discarded chairs visible along the right side. Pedestrians including a woman with a child and a construction worker walk through the dim corridor toward the brighter exit visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic commercial district that transitions from a sun-drenched urban street into the dim, neon-lit shadows of a massive overpass. It begins on a bright orange textured sidewalk lined with teal-awning shops and Watson billboards, moving past pedestrians and passing traffic. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the scene opens up under a massive Milfgaard digital billboard, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst a flow of futuristic cars and sports vehicles. The lighting then shifts dramatically from bright afternoon sunlight to deep shadow as the camera moves beneath the looming concrete structure, passing a red neon 2nd Amendment sign and thick support pillars. Finally, the view becomes fully enclosed within the dark corridor of the overpass, where debris and artificial lights line the walkway before the path leads toward a distant, brighter exit.
